title: Trailer Vibes
description: Modpack to look like the trailers ! ⛏️
body:
![Trailer Vibes logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe5c0f66ca46998ea6c7e3e18296d71440185562.png)
------------

### Dive into the Minecraft Trailers !

This modpack tries to recreate the Minecraft Trailers look in game. Using PBR textures and shader to get it close as possible ✨

- Immersive sounds
- Animations
- Optimization
- Structures
- Visual effects

-----------

🔁 Switch between 2 resource pack profiles ! [Profile 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2r1e5xK3/images/1a50c73fd48c1edb949235b64436d4ef5f4467d2.png) keeps Bare Bones style, [Profile 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2r1e5xK3/images/1ee37f852c3984ddd30635d477c97c66d9078db0.png) adds some 3D stuff ! (latest gallery images)

☀️ Choose _**BSL Shaders**_ or _**Complementary Reimagined + Euphoria Patches**_ to light up your world !

Play in third person to feel **animated** ! First person is also overhauled thanks to [Punchy](https://modrinth.com/mod/punchy-fpa) !

🌳 There is [CliffTree](https://modrinth.com/datapack/clifftree) as worldgen mod, it doesn't change the shape of the world, it adds some new biomes using Vanilla blocks and subtly improves existing ones

> 👉 This modpack is inspired by [Low Res Trailer Recreation](https://modrinth.com/modpack/low-res-trailer-recreation) and [Fresh & Smooth](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fresh-smooth)

-----------


<details>
<summary>How to change Resource Pack Profile ?</summary>

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a939c665aef4af490d63288115efb470f22a410.jpeg)
-----------
### Click on the button at top left corner

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6fe80989c939a2ec5342841b002f89edeb96c98_0.webp)
-----------
### Choose the profile

![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fe71dfd34cc88fefeee454987309ca5dbfc1931_0.webp)
-----------
### Apply Packs and done !

</details>




<details>
<summary>How to get Emissive Ores ?</summary>

Place [Bare Bones Emissive Ores labPBR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-emissive-ores-labpbr) at the top of the resource pack list !

Same process for [Bare Bones Cute Pumpkin](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-cute-pumpkin) or [Bare Bones Shorter Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-shorter-grass)

</details>


<details>
<summary>How to turn on Ray Tracing ?</summary>

You can apply Photonics in Shader Packs>Complementary>Shader Pack Settings>Configure Euphoria Patches>Modded Settings>Photonics

From there you can choose to turn it **on** (*Sharp* or *ReSTIR* mode)

It is **off** by default because it impacts a lot performance

</details>



<details>
<summary>How to generate terrain with Tectonic ?</summary>

![tectonic1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f749834a9d79b362c052ec12850e933bc432d294_0.webp)
### Go into the mod settings

![tectonic2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d1aeebbdd5aff3f8f3e7b5fdfa285febefef5bf_0.webp)
### Turn "Mod Enabled" ON

</details>

--------

### 3 versions of this Modpack ! :
> Trailer Vibes

> [Trailer Vibes Client](https://modrinth.com/modpack/trailer-vibes-client) (no worldgen or structures)

> [Trailer Vibes Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/trailer-vibes-lite) (for low end computers)
